testcase.name: test_navigate_to_register_page[chromium]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("a:has-text(\"Login\")") resolved to 3 elements: 1) Login aka locator("#top-links").get_by_role("link", name="Login") 2) login page aka get_by_role("link", name="login page") 3) Login aka locator("#column-right").get_by_role("link", name="Login") Call log: - waiting for locator("a:has-text(\"Login\")")

testcase.failure: page = @pytest.mark.sanity @pytest.mark.regression def test_navigate_to_register_page(page: Page): """ Validate different ways of navigating to 'Register Account' page """ home_page = HomePage(page) # 1. Open the Application (Handled by fixture above) # 2. Click on 'My Account' Drop menu home_page.click_my_account() # 3. Click on 'Register' option (ER-1) home_page.click_register() expect(page).to_have_title("Register Account") # 4. Click on 'My Account' Drop menu home_page.click_my_account() # 5. Click on 'Login' option > home_page.click_login() tests\ui\Register\TC_RF_007_test.py:49: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ pages\home_page.py:40: in click_login self.lnk_login.click() C:\Users\chine\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python313\site-packages\playwright\sync_api\_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( C:\Users\chine\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python313\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\chine\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python313\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) C:\Users\chine\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python313\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = cb = . at 0x000001D201FA47C0> is_internal = False, title = None async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0) parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("a:has-text(\"Login\")") resolved to 3 elements: E 1) Login aka locator("#top-links").get_by_role("link", name="Login") E 2) login page aka get_by_role("link", name="login page") E 3) Login aka locator("#column-right").get_by_role("link", name="Login") E E Call log: E - waiting for locator("a:has-text(\"Login\")") C:\Users\chine\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python313\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:559: Error
